other_observers: Carrie Olson, Nick Komar, Matt Webb, many observers
specific_location: Wellington State Wildlife Area -- Schware Unit
description: Mostly black chicken-like marsh bird similar to American Coot.  Obvious facial shield and beak with a yellow tip.  Most of the bird was black with a white horizontal stripe on the flanks, and a dark brown back.  The legs were yellow/greenish.
